payload.author: claude
payload.body: Mostly landed by the SCP-167/185 work: PG store+replay now back the serving path (tenant replicas), hosted OIDC/API-key auth middleware is live, schema/RLS on boot. REMAINING to close Milestone B: (1) LISTEN/NOTIFY fan-out - bridge src/realtime/bus.js makePgBus into emitChange/SSE when PG is configured so a second app instance fans out; (2) quota middleware - wire src/quota (event quota on push, connection tracker on SSE, rate limiter) into the hosted path.
